arts.ttl: Sunderland and Luton Town interested in signing Willem Geubbels
arts.sum: According to Foot Mercato, Sunderland and Luton Town are interested in signing Willem Geubbels (23) from St. Gallen. The Swiss club have rejected a series of bids for the French striker…

arts.ttl: Blackburn and Luton see bids rejected as Sunderland prepare offer of their own
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers and Luton Town have seen bids for FC. St Gallen’s Willem Geubbels rejected, with Sunderland now expected to add their name to the list of bidders. That’s according to Foot Mercato, who say the Swiss side are showing no interest in selling the 23-year-old in this window. arts.ttl: Luton Town make new £7m bid for 21-year-old star
